assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Current problem
What need or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe your desired solution.

## Alternatives considered
What alternatives did you consider?

## Scope / Components
- [ ] API (.NET)
- [ ] PHP client (intranet)
- [ ] forgot_password
- [ ] Build / Packaging
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Expected benefits
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] UX
- [ ] Maintainability
- [ ] Compatibility
- [ ] Other

## Acceptance criteria (proposal)
- [ ] Criterion 1:
- [ ] Criterion 2:
- [ ] Criterion 3:

## Breaking change impact
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

If yes, describe required migration.

## Proposed priority
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Technical context (optional)
Add examples, pseudo-code, endpoints, diagrams, screenshots, etc.
